description: Black-and-white photograph with no on-image text or graphic design, showing a group of people, mostly men in work shirts and ball caps, photographed from behind as they stand facing a large American flag hung on the corrugated-metal back wall of an industrial workshop or hangar. Visible on the back of one person's shirt is 'I [heart] TRADES / WE SUPPORT MANUFACTURING'. The tweet text reads 'AMERICA FIRST.'
